name: Patient
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not perfect, I will be rejected and alone.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of situations that may lead to judgment or failure.
situation: Recalling a prior interaction with HR that involved feeling judged during medical leave.
auto_thought: I can't handle this; I will be judged and rejected.
behavior: Withdrawal from social interactions and avoidance of challenging situations.
